name: AE86 EUROBEAT DRIFT
short_description: Drive the legendary car surrounded by sakura trees, collect eurobeat tapes and become master at the art of drifting.
detailed_description:
Wishlist our friends' new game:


About the Game

AE86 EUROBEAT DRIFT is a risk-rewarding physics-based drifting game about collecting eurobeat tapes and escaping deadly saws. You will master the art of drifting, go through tons of obstacles and collect all the music tapes so people hear how good music sounds.


• Fast-paced gameplay.
• Funky car physics without brakes.
• Unique aesthetic𝖈.
• Minimalist artstyle.
• 30 handcrafted hardcore levels.
• Original eurobeat soundtrack.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
